## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run build` passes locally
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the changes
- [ ] I have validated updated blocks against the Slack Block Kit Builder
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Docs/README updated (if public API changed)
- [ ] `docs/support-matrix.md` updated (if supported Slack surface changed)
- [ ] Validation behavior updated and tested (if new fields, limits, or formats were added)
- [ ] Semver impact considered and called out in the PR description
